transcript: Uh, this is Christian. Uh, who is, uh, who is this?
Oh, this is Barney callin’. How ya doin’ today?
Yeah? Yeah? Well, hey, I need to talk to you a little bit about some equipment, here. We got a couple problems up here.
Specifically, I think you picked up a couple o’ my pieces of equipment and I have yet to get them back.
Uh, I’m actually not sure what this is pertaining to. Um, you’re saying this is Barney?
Okay! What, uh, what is the equipment you’re referring to?
Well, I’ve got a nonagonical harness. [exhales] And I’ve got a hydraulic buttress and a number o’ rotors that’re all gone now. You picked ‘em up inadvertently and took ‘em, is what you did.
Eh—what is this in context of?
I got your number from Luigi up at UEG. [sniffs]
I gotta be honest. I don’t know what the context of this is at all. Where are you talking about me supposedly have picked this stuff up?

See, that doesn’t surprise me. I’ve lived nine years in the business, my friend. So I understand that you don’t know the technicality of what I’m talkin’ about, here. But I just wanna get my items back with a clean coat o’ WD-40, at this point, atop everything. You got me there, Christian?

Uh, who—who? Y—I don’t even know who—what this is in reference to. I don’t—what business is this part of? I’m a tech director. I do directing. I’m not sure what you’re asking me about. I don’t know who Luigi is.

Well, see, that’s what I mean. You just t—didn’t know what you were doing. You didn’t know what you were lookin’ at. You thought it was somethin’ else. You know, you don’t understand the technicality in that aspect of that, in that facet of it. So, if I could get my belongings back, I won’t need to go to the Union and file a Grievance.
Well, I understand what you’re saying—
—but I don’t—I don’t even know where the shoot you’re referring to is. Like where—where would this stuff have been that I would’ve taken it?
If you’re not familiar with that side of the business, I’ve put nine and a half years in the business, my friend!
Okay! Um, y—you can go ahead and file a Grievance. I’m not sure what this is in reference to—
—or who this is part of. I don’t have time for this today. I have to go and do my business. So, I’m gonna hang up now. But thank you very much for you time!—
—I’ve got ten years in the business, my friend!
[laughs] That’s great! I do, too. Um, thank you very much, sir. I don’t know where this is reference to—
—Oh, I’ll tell you exactly what it’s in reference to. It’s in reference to—
Listen, guy, lemme get my harness up there real frickin’ quick, okay?!
Where do you think your harness is? Like where would this have been? What shoot are you referring to?
Oh, my buttress, my harness, my rotors, they’re all missing! On account o’ what ya done!—
—I don’t know anything about this. I haven’t done anything. I would appreciate to know what this is in context to.
You wanna sit down with my Union Steward or whadda you want me to do up here?!
—where would this stuff supposedly be, sir?
It’s supposed to be in my possession on my tool belt right now! My name’s Barney Blaha. I’m with Local 2—
—and I need to know what’s goin’ on around here!—

—“Barney Blaha”. Okay! Well, I don’t know where those are. Uh, I wouldn’t know anything about it. But I am at work and I’m gonna have to go talk to some people. So, um, if you want, you can go ahead and, uh, contact your Union Rep and we’ll take care of it that way!
Yes, what can I do for ya?
Um, someone transferred you to me! About a safety harness?—
No. Uh, actually, lemme ask you this: I was getting a phone call this morning about some sort of a safety harness issue. What business is this? Who am I speaking to right now?
—And you’re getting a—a what kind of phone call?

I was getting a phone call from someone that—they were asking me about a harness and a rotor and something else—since you were saying that I was transferred to you—and I didn’t initiate this phone call. Can I just ask where is this call from? Like who—who am I speaking to? What is the business?

Uh, this is Quixote Production Supplies. But I have no idea who I—I spoke to on the phone before you. They made it sound like you were their client interested in a safety harness and then transferred you to me. [unclear]—

—No. Okay. I understand. You’re probably in the dark too. Okay, cool! I’ve been getting a phone call this morning. Someone was claiming that I had taken their equipment and they wouldn’t tell me what shoot or anything it was connected with. So… Alright! Well, I am so sorry to have bothered you today—
Not at all, man. Um, but yeah, some weirdo—
—Okay! Uh, the guy who called me claimed he was Barney. I didn’t initiate the call. I don’t know how they, uh, they linked me through here.
No problem! Um, there’s a “Gloria Duterte”? Does that mean anything to you? That’s the person who called me—
[chuckles] N—no. What was the name you just said?
Uh, Gloria. And then the last name is “D-U-A-R-T-E”.
Duarte? Uh, no, I don’t know. Uh, do you know how she was connected with it?
[ sample of Wayne Bent ] It just occured.
—W—what? It—there’s another voice on the line now? What’s going on?
[ sample of Wayne Bent ] Yes. Yes.
Uh, I have no idea what this is. I’m gonna hang up—
—Uh, thank you very much for your time.
[ sample of Wayne Bent ] It wasn’t—
[ sample of Wayne Bent ] It wasn’t at my instruction or behest.
[ samples of Wayne Bent ] Well, um— I am the embodiment of God. I am Divinity and humanity combined.
Think you got the wrong number, pal.
[ sample of Wayne Bent ] No!— No!
[ samples of Wayne Bent ] —It wasn’t— It wasn’t— It is a defining moment and God’s people are going to be vindicated—
[ sample of Wayne Bent ] —and the world is going to be judged. It’s final. You can take that to the bank.
